name: brand-world-studio
description: Brand briefs, visual systems, image-model routing, production prompt packs, and consistency verification.

interface.shortDescription: Turn approved positioning into a coherent visual world.
interface.longDescription: Brand World Studio routes approved strategy into a visual brief, identity system, image-model choice, production prompt pack, and consistency review without inventing upstream positioning.
defaultPrompt: Turn this approved positioning into a production-ready brand brief.
Choose the right image model and prompt workflow for this visual job.
Check this image series against the approved brand system.
